message:
fix(broadcast): replace Vec<RecvWaiter> with Arena<Waker> to prevent stale waker accumulation

The old design used a Vec of RecvWaiter structs with an AtomicBool
queued flag.  When a future was polled with a new waker (task migration),
the old waker remained in the vec and could be woken instead of the
current one.  Switching to Arena<Waker> and using retain() for wake-all
eliminates the stale-waker class of bugs.

Includes a regression test (repro_broadcast_stale_waker) that polls
with two different wakers and asserts only the latest one is notified.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
